name: Feta Cheese Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together all ingredients except for the oil and crepes.
2. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Lay out each crepe on the skillet.
5. Place 2 to 4 tablespoons of the feta mixture onto each crepe.
6. Fold the crepe in half to enclose the filling.
7. Fry the crepes, turning them continuously, until they are soft and golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
